title: callista herbacea
intro: Callista herbacea, also known as the sweet autumn clematis, is a perennial flowering vine native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callista herbacea include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Callista herbacea is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried flower, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
